title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare:
Metropolis Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare!
